contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Output for today, using AI generated scaffolding. Surprisingly did not use. as much Grok API credits as expected
  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PGA1Ie1GElI
  
  Codebase
  https://github.com/garyjob/ai_video_editor
  
  Tuned for the following kind of story archs
  - cacao beans to hot chocolate
  - ⁠cacao beans to cacao nibs
  - ⁠cacao beans to chocolate bar
  - ⁠festival highlights
  - ⁠farm visits
  - ⁠logistics movements
  
  Execution time for raw clips to compiled 30 second shorts is around 20 minutes for initial run. Likely gets shorter after the initial run since a lot of the time taken was for transcribing the conversations as well as detecting the objects within the frames within the raw clips for analysis by LLMs
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
